# HPD.ML.Regression.SdcaRegressionLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-Regression` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Regression`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Regression`
- Kind: `class`

Stochastic Dual Coordinate Ascent for regression with squared loss. Dual update: Δαᵢ = (yᵢ - wᵀxᵢ - αᵢ) / (‖xᵢ‖²/(λn) + 1)

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class SdcaRegressionLearner : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearner
```
